[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000111000 3
1 010100000 2
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000100001 2

12 21 000111000 3 match 0
